name: Fruit Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, milk, eggs, and vegetable oil in a bowl.
2. Beat with a spoon until the mixture is smooth.
3. Heat a crepe pan over medium heat.
4. Butter the pan to just coat the bottom and sides.
5. Pour in 1/3 cup batter and tip the pan to coat the bottom with batter, forming a round pancake shape.
6. Cook the crepe on medium heat until it looks dry, then turn the crepe over and cook for about 30 seconds more.
7. Place fruit in the crepe and roll up.
8. Top with whipped cream or powdered sugar.
9. Makes 8 to 10 9-inch crepes.
